evidence.observation: docs/flows/FLOW-INVENTORY.md contains a numbered inventory table with 11 major backend flow families

All 10 required flow families from the validation contract are present, plus 1 additional (Invoice/Dealer Finance listed as separate flow #8):
1. Auth / Identity (flow #1)
2. Tenant / Admin Management (flow #2)
3. Catalog / Setup Readiness (flow #3)
4. Manufacturing / Packing (flow #4)
5. Inventory Management (flow #5)
6. Order-to-Cash (O2C) (flow #6)
7. Procure-to-Pay (P2P) (flow #7)
8. Invoice / Dealer Finance (flow #8)
9. Accounting / Period Close (flow #9)
10. HR / Payroll (flow #10)
11. Reporting / Export (flow #11)

evidence.step: Verify each entry has summary, owning module, cross-module participants, and canonical packet link
evidence.observation: All 11 entries have: Summary column (lifecycle description), Owning Module(s) column, Key Cross-Module Participants column, and Canonical Packet column with links to individual flow .md files (all marked 'packet pending' as expected for this milestone)

The inventory includes: (1) numbered flow table with complete lifecycle summaries, (2) 'Key Route Prefixes by Flow Family' section mapping flows to API routes, (3) 'Supporting Workflow Guides (Historical)' cross-reference table, (4) coverage notes explaining alignment with docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, (5) cross-references to INDEX.md, MODULE-INVENTORY.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CONVENTIONS.md. A reader can discover the full flow landscape from this document alone.
